debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1) = n ^ 2

proof:
have h1 : ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1) = n ^ 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
      ring
  exact h1 n
failed_attempts:
have h1 : ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k in Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1) = n ^ 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>
      simp
    | succ n ih =>
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ, ih]
      ring
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1

have h1 : ∀ n : ℕ, ∑ k in Finset.range n, (2 * k + 1) = n ^ 2 := by
    intro n
    induction n with
    | zero =>

    | succ n ih =>

      ring
  specialize h1 n
  simpa using h1
